data.title: demo: Analytics Engine — hello world event tracking
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Analytics Engine (high-cardinality event tracking).

## What to implement

* `GET /track?userId=X&page=Y` writes a datapoint to Analytics Engine
* `wrangler.jsonc` with `analytics_engine_datasets` binding
* Comment in code showing how to query via SQL API

## Verify

```sh
curl "https://<worker>.workers.dev/track?userId=alice&page=/home"
# Then query via:
# curl "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/{id}/analytics_engine/sql" \
#   -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
#   --data "SELECT * FROM hello_events LIMIT 10"
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/analytics-engine-hello`
